name: Ojai (downtown vicinity)
notes: Home base — Class G airspace, no local ordinance

name: Lake Casitas — PROHIBITED
notes: CMWD Ordinance 20-01 explicitly bans drones at Lake Casitas. Past flights here were unenforced, not legal. Use Ventura County Comets RC field nearby instead.

name: Rose Valley (Los Padres NF)
notes: Open USFS land north of Ojai. Outside Sespe Wilderness boundary

name: Carrizo Plain
notes: BLM monument. Vast open Class G. ~3hr drive

name: Alabama Hills (Lone Pine)
notes: BLM. Iconic Sierra backdrop. ~3.5hr but worth the drive

name: Vasquez Rocks (LA County)
notes: CAUTION: LA County prohibits drones in county parks. Looks great, do not launch
